new_classes.label_en: still wine of fresh grapes with PDO in containers ≤ 2 L (CN 2204 21 11–78)
new_classes.label_de: Stillwein aus frischen Weintrauben mit g.U. in Behältnissen ≤ 2 L (KN 2204 21 11–78)
new_classes.definition_en: Wine of fresh grapes, other than sparkling wine, bearing a protected designation of origin (PDO) as defined in Additional Note 6(a) to Chapter 22, presented in containers of a nominal volume not exceeding 2 litres. This class covers CN codes 2204 21 11 to 2204 21 78.

coverage_explanation: The legal text states that CN codes 2204 21 11–78 cover wine with a protected designation of origin (PDO), citing Additional Note 6(a) to Chapter 22. The proposed axioms capture: (1) the PDO quality via ProtectedDesignationOfOriginQuality, (2) the small-container constraint (≤ 2 L) via SmallContainer, and (3) the non-sparkling (still) nature via isCarbonated = false. However, the specific alcohol-by-volume sub-ranges that further discriminate CN 2204 21 68 from its siblings (e.g. 2204 21 11, 2204 21 23, etc.) within the PDO group are not modelled here, as the legal text at this level only references Note 6(a) without specifying the ABV threshold for code 22042168 itself. A complete coverage would require modelling the ABV band applicable to 2204 21 68, which is not provided in the supplied legal notes. Coverage is therefore partial.
